title: Duck Tape Solid Colours Yellow. Repair, craft, personalise, decorate and educate - 48mm X 18.2m
features: Yellow Duck Tape to repair, craft, personalise, decorate and educate
Tears easily by hand for simple application
description: From the manufacturer Trust Duck Tape quality Choose from traditional silver to a wide range of colours, prints, strengths and sizes including multi-roll packs and Duck Ultimate. Repair, craft, mark, label, decorate. From silver to classic colours and pastels, or wild animal prints to tranquil patterns, Duck Tape is the perfect tool to have around the house and office. Add some colour to that everyday repair, label to stay organized, or make a colourful wallet or rose. Stick together while staying apart — great for social distancing applications like temporary indoor floor marking and line formation. Duck Brand Duct Tape is the simple solution for your toughest DIY or most creative projects. Repair Floor marking Crafting Decorating Fashion Wildly Creative or Supremely Practical? Great for temporary indoor floor marking and removes cleanly from most surfaces up to 3 weeks. Not recommended for hardwood floors or in direct sunlight. Use Duck Tape colours to coordinate and match your latest fix around the house, decorate and customize your space. You can even use it for heavy-duty outdoor use, gardening, bundling, labelling and color-coding. Unlimited ways to create arts and beauty. See the Duck Brand website for how to guides and ideas. Sometimes, your average tape just won’t do. Sometimes you need a tape with attitude. Maybe you have a craft that needs to be more colourful, or you want to add a little bit of a pattern to that DIY project. And yes, sometimes you just want a tape that’s more, well, standout. Whatever the occasion, we’ve got a tape to match. Duck Tape prints come in a wide variety of fun colours and styles, perfect for any creative project or home repair. Stars, flowers, unicorns and other many creative patterns.
